zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles於1271年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特威爾斯時，他的父親William de Welles46歲，母親Isabel Periton36歲。他於大約1296年與Joan Engaine在英國英格蘭越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1294年登記服兵役。他於1299年被列為made constable of rockingham castle, rockingham, market harborough, leicestershire。他去世於1311年9月1日在英國林可爾史爾享年40歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles于1271年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特威爾斯时，他的父亲William de Welles46岁，母亲Isabel Periton36岁。他于大约1296年与Joan Engaine在英国英格兰越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1294年登记服兵役。他于1299年被列为made constable of rockingham castle, rockingham, market harborough, leicestershire。他去世于1311年9月1日在英国林可爾史爾享年40岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Welles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wells
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles was born in 1271, in Wells, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Welles, was 46 and his mother, Isabel Periton, was 36. He married Joan Engaine about 1296, in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1294. In 1299, at the age of 28, his occupation is listed as made constable of rockingham castle, rockingham, market harborough, leicestershire. He died on 1 September 1311, in Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 40, and was buried in Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles est né en 1271, à Wells, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Welles, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Isabel Periton, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Joan Engaine environ 1296, à North Elmsall, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1294. En 1299, à l’âge de 28 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est made constable of rockingham castle, rockingham, market harborough, leicestershire. Il est décédé le 1 septembre 1311, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England: North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles 1271 in Wells, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Welles 46 und seine Mutter Isabel Periton 36. Er hat um 1296 in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Engaine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1294 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1299, als er 28 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als made constable of rockingham castle, rockingham, market harborough, leicestershire aufgeführt. Er starb am 1. September 1311 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles è nato il nel 1271 nel Wells, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Welles, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Periton, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Joan Engaine circa 1296, nel North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1294. Nel 1299, all'età di 28 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come made constable of rockingham castle, rockingham, market harborough, leicestershire. Morì il 1 settembre 1311, nel Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Adam de Welles Lord Wellesが1271年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウエルズで生まれた時，父William de Wellesは46歳，母Isabel Peritonは36歳であった。約1296年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアノース エルムサルでJoan Engaineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1294年に兵役登録をした。1299年，28歳の時，職業はmade constable of rockingham castle, rockingham, market harborough, leicestershireと記録されている。彼は1311年9月1日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで40歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles(이)가 1271년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 웰스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Welles(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Periton(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1296년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 노르스 엘사에서 Joan Engaine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1294년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1299년, 28세의 나이로 그의 직업은 made constable of rockingham castle, rockingham, market harborough, leicestershire이었다. 그는 1311년 9월 1일 영국 링코실르에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles nasceu em 1271, em Wells, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Welles, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Periton, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Engaine aproximadamente 1296, em North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1294. Em 1299, com 28 anos, sua profissão aparece como made constable of rockingham castle, rockingham, market harborough, leicestershire. Ele faleceu em 1 de setembro de 1311, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ro.North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England: North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles родился в 1271 г. в местности веллс, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Welles было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Periton, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Engaine около 1296 г. в местности норт элмсалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. В 1294 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1299 году, в возрасте 28 лет, работал по профессии made constable of rockingham castle, rockingham, market harborough, leicestershire. Он умер 1 сентября 1311 г. в местности линколншир, Англия в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности линколншир, Англия.

es.North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England: North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles nació en 1271, en Wells, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Welles, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Isabel Periton, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Joan Engaine aproximadamente 1296, en North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1294. En 1299, a la edad de 28 años, su ocupación registrada era made constable of rockingham castle, rockingham, market harborough, leicestershire. Murió el 1 de septiembre de 1311, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
